wiki_pages.title: Google "Get a Job" course
wiki_pages.body_html:
Course includes:

  • Use Google to Get a New Job

  • Start a Resume

  • How to Write a Cover Letter

  • Prepare for a Successful Job Interview

  • Edit Your Resume

  • Negotiate Your Salary

  • Use Digital Tools to Work Remotely

Enroll in the course

Tell your students to follow these instructions to join your class.

  1. Go to g.co/AppliedDigitalSkills
  2. Click "Sign in" in the top right
  3. Sign in with your Google account, or create a new one
  4. Click "I am a student"
  5. Click "Join a class" and enter class code x3dcm8

wiki_pages.title: Huntr Goals
wiki_pages.body_html:
Job seekers are required to complete five key activities each week: find and save at least five job opportunities in Huntr, then apply for at least 1 of those roles. Progress will be tracked and marked as completed within Huntr, aligning with the assigned goals.

To learn more about how to leverage your Huntr, https://guides.huntr.co/job-seeker

Presentation on AnnieCannons & Huntr

Advisors will manually enroll job seekers into the system.

wiki_pages.title: Job Platforms & Networking Resources
wiki_pages.body_html:
Be sure to check out AnnieCannons' spreadsheet of online job platforms! It also includes tabs for professional networking platforms and additional resources. Feel free to make a copy if you'd like to edit or customize it. AnnieCannons JOB PLATFORMS 

Reminder: Tech communities and forums are excellent ways to engage with like-minded professionals. They offer opportunities to learn, seek guidance on technical topics, and stay updated on industry trends and best practices.

wiki_pages.title: Preparing for Networking Events
wiki_pages.body_html:
Review the  Prepping for In-Person Networking

Use the Networking Cheat Sheet.pdf

Blogging prompt: Imagine you're preparing to attend your very first tech networking event. What would be your game plan for making meaningful connections? How would you introduce yourself, start conversations, and use tools like LinkedIn QR codes to make a lasting impression? Write about how you would navigate the event, including any challenges you anticipate and how you’d overcome them to build authentic relationships in the tech industry.

Please share the blog post belo

wiki_pages.title: Resumes
wiki_pages.body_html:
Resume Workshop: Crafting Your Standout Resume

This is designed to empower early-career individuals, like yourself, to create a compelling and industry-standard resume. Follow these steps to ensure your resume stands out in a competitive job market:

  1. Explore Industry-Standard Templates: Take a moment to review the industry-standard resume templates provided below. These templates are known for their clarity and effectiveness. As an early-career professional, aim for a concise one-page resume.


      • Best Practice Resume Template (harvard style)
      • Resume Template 1
      • Resume Template 2

  2. Create Your Rough Draft: Begin by outlining the content of your resume. Consider your education, skills, experiences, and achievements. Use the provided Resume_Template as a starting point. Make a copy and rename it to yourfirstname-lastname-draftresume.

  3. Choose Your Template: Select a template that resonates with your style and professional identity. You can choose from the templates provided or explore others that suit your preferences.

    • Make a copy of the chosen template and title it yourfirstname-lastname-resume.

  4. Organize Your Resumes: Create a dedicated folder in your drive titled "resumes." Place both your initial draft and the new version based on the chosen template in this folder. This ensures easy access and organization.

  5. Iterate and Revise: Edit your resume with a focus on clarity and impact. Remember, this is an evolving document that will be refined as you progress in your career.

Resume PROTIPS for Software Developers:  Crafting Your Tech Resume: A Comprehensive Guide

 

  • Explore real-world examples to gain inspiration and insights into effective resume writing. Check out the following resume examples:

    • Early Career Example-Harvard format.docx (*you can look at this and notice the highlighted section helps you to think of what to write)

    • entry-level-programer
    • tech-ladies-resume (*notice the content & this is a designed resume so bast to use a different format)

    • Feel free to embrace your unique style while incorporating the best practices shared in these examples.

Now, let's embark on the journey of creating a resume that truly reflects your skills and aspirations. Happy crafting!

wiki_pages.title: Technical Interview Prep Resources & Planning
wiki_pages.body_html:
Technical Interview Prep Resources

Remember that these resources and tools can support your job search and career development in the tech sector. It's important to explore and utilize those that align with your specific goals and interests. In preparation as you apply for roles, remember to ask the recruiter/person of contact what type of prep should be done and what the technical questions will focus on.
Always stay curious, keep learning, and leverage these resources to enhance your technical competence and interview performance. Good luck!

REMEMBER THAT NOTHING NEEDS TO BE PAID FOR—ALL RESOURCES ARE FREE!

wiki_pages.title: AI Prompt library & resources
wiki_pages.body_html:
✨ How to Use This  AI Resource

Explore the shared prompts, tools, resources, and workflows others have documented to see what’s possible with AI. AI Prompt library & resources : TEMPLATE  (*make your own copy if you like)

This is a living collection of ideas to help you discover how AI can support your work. Browse examples to spark your own experiments, adapt what others have tried, and contribute back when you find something that works for you.

Remember:

  • Not every tool or workflow is right for every context—use your judgment and keep our data privacy and security policies in mind.

  • As coders and learners, AI can be a powerful aid—but it doesn’t replace foundational problem-solving or critical thinking. Use it thoughtfully to complement your skills, not shortcut them.

wiki_pages.title: Resumes
wiki_pages.body_html:
Resume Workshop: Crafting Your Standout Resume

This is designed to empower early-career individuals, like yourself, to create a compelling and industry-standard resume. Follow these steps to ensure your resume stands out in a competitive job market:

  1. Explore Industry-Standard Templates: Take a moment to review the industry-standard resume templates provided below. These templates are known for their clarity and effectiveness. As an early-career professional, aim for a concise one-page resume.

    • Resume Template-best practice

  2. Create Your Rough Draft: Begin by outlining the content of your resume. Consider your education, skills, experiences, and achievements. 

  3. Choose the Provided Resume Template: The template provided is layed out well and reflects best resume practices, you can explore others and adjust to suit your preferences.

    • Make a copy of the chosen template and title it yourfirstname-lastname-resume
    • It could be within your folder in your drive titled Career Development

      Organize Your Resumes: Create a dedicated folder in your drive titled "resumes."

    • Place both any initial draft and the new version based on the template in this folder. This ensures easy access and organization.

  4. Iterate and Revise: Edit your resume with a focus on clarity and impact. Remember, this is an evolving live document that will be refined as you progress in your career. You will also be using it to make copies and revise accoerding to roles you are applying for.

Resume PROTIPS for Software Developers:  Crafting Your Tech Resume: A Comprehensive Guide

 

  • Explore real-world examples to gain inspiration and insights into effective resume writing. Check out the following resume examples:

    • Harvard CV Early Career Template.docx

    • resume-example-software
    • entry-level-programer

    • Feel free to embrace your unique style while incorporating the best practices shared in these examples.

Now, let's embark on the journey of creating a resume that truly reflects your skills and aspirations. Happy crafting!
